originalTitle: Nigeria halts Christian pilgrimages to Holy Land over Middle East conflict
title: Nigeria halts Christian pilgrimages to Holy Land over Middle East conflict
content: NCPC say the measure is necessary to prioritise the "safety and comfort" of Nigerian pilgrims.

originalTitle: Nigerian doctors suspended over death of Adichie's son
title: Nigerian doctors suspended over death of Adichie's son
content: The author's 21-month-old son died in January after complications during medical procedures at a private hospital in Lagos.

originalTitle: Ethiopia experiments with 'smart' police stations that have no officers
title: Ethiopia experiments with 'smart' police stations that have no officers
content: A project to introduce unmanned sites is part of a broader adoption of digital technologies.

originalTitle: New Zealand annihilate South Africa to reach T20 World Cup final
title: New Zealand annihilate South Africa to reach T20 World Cup final
content: Finn Allen hits fastest century at a T20 World Cup as New Zealand crush South Africa by nine wickets to reach final.

originalTitle: Formula One teams on edge as new regulations face first test in Australia
title: Formula One teams on edge as new regulations face first test in Australia
content: F1's technical changes pose challenges for drivers and engineers alike and raise concerns over quality of racing.

originalTitle: Iraqi women’s rights activist Yanar Mohammed killing spurs call for justice
title: Iraqi women’s rights activist Yanar Mohammed killing spurs call for justice
content: Amnesty International decries Mohammed's killing as 'calculated assault to stifle human rights defenders' in Iraq.

originalTitle: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
title: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
content: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.

originalTitle: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn
title: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn
content: The party's founder Nikos Mihaloliakos and other officials are again found guilty, almost six years after an original trial.

originalTitle: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury
title: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury
content: Scott Bessent says that "likely sometime this week" the US will increase its global tariff on imports from the existing 10%.

originalTitle: Maguire given reduced 15-month suspended sentence for Greece incident
title: Maguire given reduced 15-month suspended sentence for Greece incident
content: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has his suspended sentence reduced to 15 months at a retrial following an incident in Greece in 2020.

originalTitle: Fletcher banned for six games for homophobic slur
title: Fletcher banned for six games for homophobic slur
content: Manchester United midfielder Jack Fletcher apologises for using a homophobic slur that has led to him receiving a six-match ban.

originalTitle: 'It's better to be chased' - the mentality of a title race
title: 'It's better to be chased' - the mentality of a title race
content: The Premier League title race is set to go to the wire. BBC Sport has spoken to former winners to find out how players deal with the pressure.
